changelog: 1.2.10 (Build 25): Fix application initialization - remove duplicate scripts, restore version
1.2.9 (Build 24): Enhanced Contacts View - DD/MM/YYYY birthdays with dynamic age, colored tag pills with dots, page number pagination, tag toggle picker modal, groups management modal
1.2.7 (Build 22): Fix critical JavaScript timing bug - all buttons functional
1.2.0 (Build 15): Major update with new contact features
1.1.1 (Build 4): Fix login form clearing, user menu Chrome compatibility, scrollbar positioning
1.1.0 (Build 3): Add UI enhancements - header alignment, dropdown menu, profile modal, version footer
